_comment: Severity -> Jira priority mapping for scripts/create-jira-bugs.js. Bug-draft '## Severity' is red or yellow (green failures never get a draft). Human-editable; the script MUST NOT hardcode any of this. Priority names must match the names configured in your Jira instance (default scheme: Highest/High/Medium/Low/Lowest). See docs/bug-draft-format.md and phase2-integrations.md TG5.
_link_comment: Issue-link type used to link a created bug back to the story issue (only when context.story.jira_issue_key exists). Must match a link type name in your Jira instance (read via jira_get_issue_link_types). 'Relates' exists in the default scheme.
